title: Asparagopsis triacantha
taxonomy: Asparagopsis triacantha is a species of red algae in the family Bonnemaisoniaceae. It belongs to the phylum Rhodophyta and is classified as a member of the class Florideophyceae. Within the class Florideophyceae, Asparagopsis triacantha is further classified as a member of the order Rhodymeniales. The species has also been classified based on its habitat, with some sources recognizing it as a marine algae found in tropical and subtropical regions. This classification helps to distinguish Asparagopsis triacantha from other species of red algae.
